package.name: car_supervisor
package.description:
On-vehicle mission/actuation adapter — the real-car replacement for sim_supervisor.
Translates the uDV AS state machine (/assi/state) and selected mission (/ami/mission) into mission_control_node's SetMission → RuntimeControl action protocol, and relays the control output to the uDV actuation surface (/steering/cmd in degrees, /force_ebs service) — only while AS Driving.
The supervision policy (AS-state machine, AMI→mission mapping) and actuation scaling are pure, unit-tested modules (policy.py, actuation.py). See docs/CAR_ADAPTATION.md for the open firmware gaps.
